description: Family Show, Gallery Show, Person Show, and Login are the priority for the mobile-first refactor. Other pages follow existing patterns but are not the primary focus.

Tree is the hero content, full-width with natural scroll in both directions (overflow-auto). Scrollbars hidden via scrollbar-width:none and ::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}. Side panel collapses into a drawer with two sections: people search (type-to-suggest, no pre-populated list) and gallery list.
Side panel shows inline on the right with people search and gallery list. Same component structure as mobile, rendered inline instead of in a drawer.

Mobile: first tap focuses/selects a person (centers, highlights with ring or scale). Second tap on focused person navigates to profile. No long-press needed. Desktop: click to select stays as-is. Keyboard: Enter to focus, Enter on focused to navigate. Cards have role=button, aria-label, tabindex=0.

Mobile: back arrow + family name + drawer toggle + bottom sheet menu (edit, delete). Create subfamily and manage people removed from mobile. Desktop: all toolbar actions visible directly including kinship.
Mobile: back arrow + gallery name + select (primary, always visible) + bottom sheet menu (upload, layout toggle). Desktop: all actions visible directly.
Mobile: 2-column masonry (columns-2, sm:columns-3), generous gap-2, aspect ratios preserved. Desktop: md:columns-4 lg:columns-5.

Full-screen image with swipe left/right navigation (~50px threshold + velocity). Top bar: close (X) + position indicator (3 of 47) + info/comments button. No thumbnail strip. Info overlay must close before navigating. At first/last photo: bounce effect, no wrap. Single photo: swipe disabled, no indicator.

Current layout preserved: side panel for people/comments (see gallery-show-lightbox-panel for the panel's tonal system), thumbnail strip at bottom, arrow key navigation. Photo tagging enabled on desktop only.
Mobile: full-screen overlay with file list and progress indicators. Can close while uploads continue in background. Desktop: centered modal. Drag-and-drop disabled on mobile.
Photo tagging disabled on mobile (conflicts with swipe navigation). Available only on desktop where click-to-tag works without gesture conflicts.

Mobile: tap select button to enter mode, tap photos to toggle. Bottom action bar fixed at bottom with safe-area-inset-bottom padding. Shows count + actions (delete, move). Z-index above content, below overlays.

Hero photo header: full-width image, max-h-64 w-full object-cover. Name overlaid at bottom with gradient scrim (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/50 to-transparent), white text, p-4. No photo fallback (hero): initials on bg-ds-surface-low. Small cards in relationships use placeholder icon instead.

Mobile: hero photo with name overlay, key facts (birth, death, gender, families as tappable chips navigating to family show, alternate names as badges), relationships (vertical stack of cards, person entries tappable to their person show page), tagged photos (2-column grid, sm:grid-cols-3). Actions in bottom sheet menu.

Photo: constrained w-64 h-64 object-cover rounded-ds-sharp on left. Name as heading + facts beside it (lg:flex lg:gap-8). Name no longer overlaid. Relationships in lg:grid-cols-2. Tagged photos md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5. Actions visible in toolbar.

Each group (spouses & children, parents & siblings) as a card with bg-ds-surface-card on bg-ds-surface-low. Person entries show small photo (or placeholder icon) + name, tappable to navigate to person show. Add relationship button at bottom.

Mobile-first full-screen form: logo centered at top (pt-16 pb-8), large full-width inputs (email + password), full-width primary submit button (gradient), forgot password link below. Registration route currently disabled. Desktop: max-w-sm centered, bg-ds-surface background, no decorative panels.

Slide-in panel from right for mobile. Single component instance: translate-x-full by default, translate-x-0 when open via CSS transform. On lg: transform removed, renders inline. State via JS.toggle_class() — no server round-trip. Backdrop overlay, close via tap/X/Escape. Animation: 200ms ease-out.

Replaces overflow menu on mobile. Triggered by ellipsis icon button. Slides up from bottom of screen. Full-width action rows with icon + label, min 48px height. Open/close via JS.toggle(). Backdrop overlay. Animation: 200ms ease-out slide up. On desktop: actions render directly in toolbar instead.

Used for lightbox, photo comments, upload, and login on mobile. Uses min-h-[100svh] w-full as base with h-dvh progressive enhancement. Focus trapping, aria-modal=true. Animation: 200ms ease-out. Extends existing modal pattern.
Sticky top bar with back navigation, page title, and action buttons. Minimum 44px tap targets. Desktop enhances with more visible actions and wider spacing.

Edit forms (family edit, relationship edit, person form) render inside full-screen overlays on mobile. Date picker grids reflow to stack vertically. Person picker uses same type-to-suggest pattern as drawer people search.

Shared mobile components live in lib/web/components/mobile.ex (drawer, bottom_sheet, sheet_action). Imported globally via Web.Components.Mobile in lib/web.ex html_helpers. toggle_drawer/1 and toggle_bottom_sheet/1 are JS-only functions using JS.toggle_class — no server state needed.

Swipe gesture hook in assets/js/swipe.js. Registered in app.js hooks. Uses touchstart/touchmove/touchend with 50px threshold and velocity check. Pushes lightbox_keydown events with ArrowLeft/ArrowRight keys. Prevents vertical scroll when horizontal swipe detected.
PhotoTagger hook disabled on mobile via window.innerWidth < 1024 check at mount(). Returns early without creating overlay containers. Re-enabled on desktop viewports.

All modals use items-end lg:items-center on the container, max-w-none lg:max-w-md on the content panel, and rounded-t-lg lg:rounded-ds-sharp for mobile bottom-sheet style / desktop centered dialog pattern.

Dark-mode tonal panel with 4-step scale (L1 0.03, L2 0.06, L3 0.10, L4 0.16 on white). People + Comments rendered as L2 cards on L1 base. No border dividers — section separation via card edges and whitespace. Empty states at text-white/50 with an icon-on-tonal-circle treatment using bg-white/[0.04] (deliberate sub-L1 micro-tone — only used for ghost elements inside L2 cards). Composer is an L3 tonal block with a borderless textarea inside. Selected mobile comment uses L4 instead of an outline. Header label unified to 'Photo info' across breakpoints.

Segmented pill toggle in desktop toolbar with hero-share (graph) and hero-queue-list (tree) icons. bg-ds-surface-highest container, active state bg-ds-on-surface text-ds-surface. Separated from action icons by 1px divider. Mobile: nav drawer action that toggles between views, showing the opposite view's icon and label.

Indented outline tree view using PersonTree (nested hierarchy: person → partners → children). Person cards are minimal rows: 32px photo circle, name, dates, gender border-l-2 accent, navigate-to-person link (desktop hover), has_more_up/down chevron indicators. Partners shown as subdued inline rows with relationship labels. Children indented under parents with border-l connector lines (border-ds-outline-variant/20). Focus state: bg-ds-primary-container text-ds-on-primary. Duplicates shown as muted italic back-refs. View mode persisted in URL via ?view=tree param.

Index/grid pages (org index, family index) use bg-white page background with bg-ds-surface-card cards carrying shadow-ds-card for grounded elevation. shadow-ds-ambient is reserved for floating layers (modals, popovers, drawers). Cards retain rounded-ds-sharp, hover:bg-ds-surface-highest, and transition-colors.
